(Bridge proposal B => A B to expectation AB > D C)
(Proposal canonizes B to cover A and B which forms identity AB)
(Undersign AB with B to link canonization to expected identity)
AB > D C
AB = B

(Misfit: underfitting — B => B misses the AB > D C relationship and nodes A, D, C)
(Scaffold to bridge the gap from B into the full expected structure)
AB > D C
AB == A B
A = D C

( Bridge underfitting gap: proposal A => A B misses relationship AB > D C )
( Establish the expected relationship between D and C )
AB > D C
( Bidirectionally map the proposal identity A to the expected compound AB )
A == AB

(this scaffolding bridges the underfit between A => A and AB > D C)
(introduce missing identity B to complete the AB signature)
B
(declare the expected relationship)
AB > D C
(countersign AB to its constituent identities A and B)
AB == A B

(Misfit: underfitting — proposal E => A C E omits the relationship ACE > B D)
(Scaffold bridges E's canonization into the expected ACE relationship)
ACE > B D
ACE == E

(Canonize ACE from C to establish composite identity)
C => A C E
(Bridge underfit gap: relate ACE to uncovered nodes B and D)
ACE > B D

(Expand C into the composite identity ACE)
ACE = A C E
(Declare the expected relationship)
ACE > B D
(Canonize C as foundational anchor from the proposal)
C => C

ACE
ACE > B D
ACE == A C E
